task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Admin Panel — Moderate User-Submitted Content** (Level 7)

ARCHETYPE: admin_tool. Shape: auth-gated admin app for reviewing + moderating user-submitted records. The CORE is that EVERY mutation endpoint has `requires role 'admin'` (not just `requires login`). An admin can list pending reviews, approve them, reject them. NOT a generic CRUD — the admin role gating is the differentiator.
